# GitHub Copilot — course repository

Follow `AGENTS.md` for project context.

## Contributing with Copilot

- Maintain original course content in your own words
- Run `npm run docs:build` before claiming docs changes done
- Run `bash scripts/validate-harness.sh .` when editing templates

## Session rules

1. Run `bash scripts/init.sh` before substantive edits
2. One logical change per session when possible
3. Update PROGRESS.md for multi-session work

## Docs

- VitePress config: `docs/.vitepress/config.ts`
- New modules go in `docs/modules/` with consistent template sections
